title: carmichaelia astonii
intro: Carmichaelia astonii, also known as Aston's broom, is a flowering plant species native to New Zealand. Traditionally, Aston's broom was used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is said to have health benefits such as soothing skin irritations and reducing fever, while also exhibiting antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, Aston's broom can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to aid in wound healing and to reduce inflammation.
